def negative_dataset_not_using_dataloader():
    rule_id = "dataset_not_using_dataloader"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Manual dataset batching loops that bypass torch.utils.data.DataLoader."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
